views.title: Executive Lifecycle
views.question: Where is the cycle, where are the losses, and what system governs improvement?

views.title: Legal Evidence
views.question: Which claims are source-backed, current-edition checked, and reviewed?

views.title: Control Tower
views.question: Which step needs which action, by whom, and with what evidence?

views.title: Pilot Gates
views.question: Which gate is blocked by missing evidence, owner, system, or deadline?

hard_rules: No current/latest legal wording unless approved_l3 and current_edition_verified=true.
No additive day-saving claims without overlap/dependency review.
Every red/amber dashboard state must link to an evidence row.
Default graph views must hide unrelated edges.
